auth.guestWarning: Записи гостя хранятся локально. Создайте аккаунт для резервного копирования.
auth.passwordTooShort: Пароль должен содержать не менее 8 символов
auth.termsPrefix: Создавая аккаунт, вы соглашаетесь с нашими

onboarding.step2Subtitle: Записывайте эмоции, замечайте закономерности, развивайтесь каждый день

onboarding.feature2Subtitle: Обнаруживайте тенденции настроения с еженедельными отчётами

home.guestLimitBody: Создайте бесплатный аккаунт, чтобы продолжить ведение дневника.
home.intentBannerAI: Your first AI insight will appear after 7 entries.
home.intentBannerDefault: Welcome! Tap "New Entry" to write your first journal.
home.intentBannerEmotions: Try the Quick mood check-in below to get started.
home.intentBannerHabits: Set a daily reminder to build your journaling habit.
home.intentBannerMedia: Tap Quick or Voice for 30-second entries.
home.intentBannerPatterns: Your mood trends will appear after your first week.
home.intentBannerPrivacy: Your journal is end-to-end encrypted and stays yours.
home.intentBannerStress: Start with a short entry — even one sentence helps.
home.noEntriesStart: Tap "New Entry" to start your journaling journey
home.shareYourMoodSubtitle: Create beautiful share cards for stories
home.showingCachedData: Showing cached data — pull to refresh
home.streakCelebration3: You're building a habit. Keep going!
home.streakCelebration7: One full week of journaling. Incredible!
home.streakProtectedWrite: Write today to keep your {{count}}-day streak!

entry.addBulletPoints: Add bullet points for your day
entry.areYouSureDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this journal entry? This action cannot be undone.
entry.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to take photos.
entry.emotionSenseDisclaimer: Analyzed by EmotionSense AI · not clinical advice
entry.entryNotFoundSubtitle: Unable to load this journal entry. Please check your connection.
entry.errorPickPhoto: Failed to pick photo. Please try again.
entry.errorRecording: Could not start recording. Please try again.
entry.errorSaveBody: Please write something in your journal entry.
entry.failedDeleteEntry: Failed to delete entry. Please try again.
entry.failedSaveChanges: Failed to save changes. Please try again.
entry.galleryPermission: Photo library access is needed to pick photos.
entry.guestLimitBody: You have used all 3 free entries. Create a free account to continue journaling!
entry.micPermission: Microphone access is needed to record voice notes.
entry.noTranscriptBody: Could not transcribe audio. Please try again.
entry.oneLineLimit: One-line entries must be 60 characters or fewer.
entry.selectMoodBody: Please select how you are feeling.
entry.transcriptionFailedBody: Could not transcribe audio. Please try again.
entry.voiceAutoStarts: Auto-starts recording — use mic button below

insights.title: Аналитика
insights.unlockInsightsBody: Получите еженедельный анализ ИИ, облака слов и анализ настроений.
insights.noDataSubtitle: Начните вести дневник, чтобы увидеть закономерности

history.title: История
history.noHistorySubtitle: Начните вести дневник, чтобы создать историю
history.failedLoad: Failed to load your journal entries. Please check your connection and try again.
history.noMatchingSubtitle: No entries match this mood filter. Try another mood or clear the filter.
history.noPhotosSubtitle: Add photos to your journal entries to see them here
history.showingCachedData: Showing cached data — pull to refresh
history.signUpToSync: Sign up to sync entries to cloud
history.startJournalingHere: Start journaling to see your entries here

search.title: Поиск
search.askPlaceholder: Что сделало вас счастливым в прошлом месяце?
search.unlockJournalAIBody: Задавайте вопросы о всей истории дневника с помощью ИИ
search.rateLimitReached: Вы достигли дневного лимита запросов ИИ
search.askEmptySubtitle: Ask a question and get an AI-powered answer based on your actual journal entries.
search.couldNotAnswer: Could not get an answer. Please try again.
search.failedSearch: Failed to search entries. Please check your connection and try again.
search.guestModeBody: Create a free account to sync and search across all devices.
search.noCachedResults: No cached results found. Connect to search all entries.
search.noEntriesFoundSubtitle: We couldn't find any entries matching "{{query}}".
search.offlineCacheOnly: Searching recent cached entries only. Connect to search all your journal entries.
search.searchSubtitle: Search across all your entries. Find specific moments, feelings, or events.
search.upgradeFullTextSubtitle: Search across all entries instantly with Premium

settings.title: Настройки
settings.deleteAccountBody: Это навсегда удалит ваш аккаунт и все записи. Это действие нельзя отменить.
settings.deleteAccountSubscribed: Удаление аккаунта не отменит подписку. Управляйте ею отдельно в настройках App Store.
settings.deleteAccountFailed: Ошибка удаления аккаунта. Попробуйте ещё раз.
settings.activeSubscriptionBody: Deleting your account will NOT cancel your subscription. You must cancel it separately to avoid being charged.
settings.comingSoonAlertBody: Push notifications will be available in a future update.
settings.enterPasswordConfirm: Enter your password to confirm account deletion. This cannot be undone.
settings.failedFetchEntries: Failed to fetch entries. Please check your connection and try again.
settings.noEntriesToExport: You have no journal entries to export.
settings.noPurchasesBody: We could not find any previous purchases.
settings.notEnoughDataBody: Journal at least 5 times to get a personalized schedule.
settings.notificationsDisabledAndroid: Notification permission was denied. On Android 13+, you need to allow notifications in Settings > Apps > Daiyly > Notifications.
settings.notificationsDisabledIOS: Please enable notifications in your device settings to receive reminders.
settings.pushNotificationsSubtitle: Coming soon in a future update
settings.restoreFailed: Failed to restore purchases. Please try again.
settings.sharingNotAvailable: Sharing is not available on this device.
settings.smartRemindersOff: Learns when you journal and reminds you
settings.smartRemindersOn: Reminds you at your usual journaling time
settings.smartScheduleBody: Based on your journaling habits, the best time is {{time}}. Use this?
settings.therapistReportSubtitle: Share a 30-day AI summary with your therapist

paywall.headline: Познай себя, расти каждый день
paywall.subtitle: Отслеживайте эмоции в реальном времени. Замечайте закономерности. Чувствуйте себя лучше.
paywall.trialNotice: 7-дневная пробная версия, затем $29.99/год. Отмените в любое время.
paywall.finePrint: Подписка автоматически обновляется, если не отменена не менее чем за 24 часа до конца текущего периода. Управляйте в настройках App Store.

sharing.title: Карточки для sharing

happy: Радость — это выбор, и вы выбрали хорошо
angry: Гнев — это просто неправильно направленная страсть
tired: Даже солнце заходит, чтобы взойти снова

sharing.cardSizeHint: Card will be shared as an image (1080x1920)
sharing.shareFailedBody: Could not share your card. Please try again.

recovery.title: Данные нечитаемы
recovery.guestBody: Локальный ключ шифрования был потерян. Создайте аккаунт, чтобы предотвратить это, или начните заново.

notifications.reminderBody: Как вы себя чувствуете сегодня? Уделите минуту дневнику.
notifications.moodInsightBody: Your most common mood this week was {{emoji}} with an average score of {{score}}/100.
notifications.notificationsBlockedSubtitle: Tap to open Settings and allow notifications
notifications.smartReminderBody: You usually write around this time
notifications.smartScheduleSubtitle: Find the best time based on your habits
notifications.streakBroken: Your streak has reset. Journal today to start a new one!
notifications.streakGoingStrong: Amazing! Your {{count}}-day streak is going strong!
notifications.streakKeepUp: You're on a {{count}}-day streak. Keep it up!
notifications.streakProtectBody: Your {{streak}}-day streak needs one entry today
notifications.timeToJournalBody: Take a moment to reflect on your day.
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.weeklySummaryBody: You wrote {{entries}} entries this week with {{words}} total words.

errors.unknownError: Что-то пошло не так. Попробуйте ещё раз.

healthKit.correlationGood: On days with 7+ hours, your entries tend to be more positive.
healthKit.correlationLow: Most tracked days had less than 7 hours. Sleep may be affecting your mood.
healthKit.correlationMid: Getting more sleep could help improve your journal mood scores.
healthKit.sleepHighMood: Great sleep ({{hours}}h) likely boosted your mood today
healthKit.sleepLowMood: You slept only {{hours}}h — low sleep often affects mood

streak.graceEarned: 7+ day streak earns a 1-day grace period
streak.gracePeriodBody: Once you reach a 7-day streak, you earn a 1-day grace period. This means you can miss one day without breaking your streak — life happens, and your progress is protected.
streak.motivational0: Start your streak today. Every journey begins with one entry.
streak.motivational1: Great start! Keep going — consistency is where the magic happens.
streak.motivational100: 100+ days. You've made journaling part of who you are. Legendary.
streak.motivational14: Two weeks strong! You're in the top 20% of journalers.
streak.motivational3: You're building a real habit. Three more days for your first week!
streak.motivational30: A full month! Your self-awareness is growing every single day.
streak.motivational60: Two months deep. Future you will be so grateful for this.
streak.motivational7: One full week of journaling. You're officially consistent.
streak.title: Streak Details
